subcodes.first_line: Say: My God, my God! All praise be unto Thee for having guided me unto Thy straight path and made me to recognize Thy mighty Announcement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی الهی الهی لک الحمد بما هدیتنی الی صراطک المستقیم و عرفتنی نبائک العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @thankfulness; gratitude
